description: Scattered Spider is a hacking group mostly composed of teens and young adults from the United States and the United Kingdom, believed to be affiliated with the cybercriminal network 'The Com'. Founded around May 2022, the group gained notoriety for hacking and extorting Caesars Entertainment and MGM Resorts International in 2023. They have also targeted numerous other companies including Visa, Marks & Spencer, and Snowflake cloud storage customers. The group uses social engineering, SIM swapping, and multi-factor authentication fatigue attacks.

country_links.evidence_quote: More recently, members of Scattered Spider have been connected with the hacks against Qantas , the flag carrier of Australia.
country_links.context: Members of Scattered Spider have been connected with hacks against Qantas, the flag carrier of Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: In June 2024, the alleged leader of the group, Tyler Buchanan (aka TylerB), was arrested in Spain when attempting to board a flight to Italy.
country_links.context: The alleged leader of the group was arrested in Spain when attempting to board a flight to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: a hacking group mostly made up of teens and young adults believed to live in the United States and the United Kingdom.
country_links.context: The group is believed to have members living in the United Kingdom.
